parq.intro: This short screening helps us determine your readiness for physical activity.
parq.q1: 1. Has your doctor ever said that you have a heart condition and that you should only do physical activity recommended by a doctor?
parq.q2: 2. Do you feel pain in your chest when you do physical activity?
parq.q3: 3. In the past month, have you had chest pain when you were not doing physical activity?
parq.q4: 4. Do you lose your balance because of dizziness or do you ever lose consciousness?
parq.q5: 5. Do you have a bone or joint problem (for example, back, knee, or hip) that could be made worse by a change in your physical activity?
parq.q6: 6. Is your doctor currently prescribing drugs (for example, water pills) for your blood pressure or heart condition?
parq.q7: 7. Do you know of any other reason why you should not do physical activity?
parq.congratsSubtitle: You are ready to safely start your personalized exercise plan in OncoSmart.
parq.consultSubtitle: For your safety, please consult your doctor before starting this exercise plan

home.firstStep: Let's make today your first step toward progress!

sessionFlow.restSubtitle: Take a short break before the next exercise.
sessionFlow.stopSubtitle: This helps us provide exercises that suit you better.

diaphragmatic-breathing.title: Diaphragmatic Breathing
diaphragmatic-breathing.description: Helps improve lung expansion and oxygen supply. Relax your shoulders. Place your dominant hand over chest and non-dominant hand over stomach. Breath in through your nose. Breath-out through mouth.

ankle-pumps.title: Ankle Pumps
ankle-pumps.description: Improves blood circulation and reduces stiffness in the legs. Sit with your legs stretched forward and slowly move your feet up and down.

thoracic-expansion.title: Thoracic Expansion
thoracic-expansion.description: Improves chest expansion and lung capacity. Sit on a chair and clasp both hands. Raise your arms upward while taking a deep breath. Slowly lower your arms while breathing out.

arm-circles.title: Arm Circles
arm-circles.description: Improves shoulder mobility. Stand upright and raise both arms to the sides. Slowly rotate your arms forward and backward in circular motion.

spot-marching.title: Spot Marching
spot-marching.description: Improves blood circulation. Stand straight and march in place by lifting your knees and moving opposite arms. Continue for two minutes.

shoulder-shrugging.title: Shoulder Shrugging
shoulder-shrugging.description: Strengthens shoulder muscles. Lift both shoulders upward toward your ears, hold briefly, then slowly lower them down.

biceps-curls.title: Biceps Curls
biceps-curls.description: Strengthens arm muscles. Slowly bend your elbows upward and bring your hands toward your shoulders, then slowly lower them back to the starting position.

wall-pushup.title: Wall Push-up
wall-pushup.description: Strengthens upper body muscles. Stand facing a wall and place your hands on the wall at shoulder level. Slowly bend your elbows and lean toward the wall, then push back to the starting position.

calf-raise.title: Calf Raises
calf-raise.description: Strengthens lower leg muscles. Stand facing a wall and take support with your hands. Slowly lift your heels and stand on your toes, then slowly lower your heels back down.

sit-to-stand.title: Sit-to-Stand
sit-to-stand.description: Strengthens lower body muscles and improves balance. Start in a sitting position on a chair, slowly stand up, then sit down again in a controlled manner.

straight-leg-raise-right.title: Straight Leg Raise (Right)
straight-leg-raise-right.description: Strengthens thigh muscles and improves knee stability. Lie on your back with the left knee bent and right leg straight. Lift your right leg up to the level of the opposite knee, then slowly lower it down.

straight-leg-raise-left.title: Straight Leg Raise (Left)
straight-leg-raise-left.description: Strengthens thigh muscles and improves knee stability. Lie on your back with the right knee bent and left leg straight. Lift the left leg up to the level of the opposite knee, then slowly lower it down.

knee-to-chest-right.title: Knee to Chest (Right)
knee-to-chest-right.description: Improves hip mobility and reduces stiffness.

knee-to-chest-left.title: Knee to Chest (Left)
knee-to-chest-left.description: Improves hip mobility and reduces stiffness.

static-quadriceps-right.title: Static Quadriceps (Right)
static-quadriceps-right.description: Strengthens thigh muscles and improves knee control.

static-quadriceps-left.title: Static Quadriceps (Left)
static-quadriceps-left.description: Strengthens thigh muscles and improves knee control.

hamstring-stretch.title: Hamstring Stretch
hamstring-stretch.description: Improves flexibility of the back thigh muscles.

quadriceps-stretch-right.description: Improves flexibility of the front thigh muscles.

quadriceps-stretch-left.title: Quadriceps Stretch (Left)
quadriceps-stretch-left.description: Improves flexibility of the front thigh muscles.
